rows.item: 学習意欲・授業参加度

summary:
During this course students will actively learn to communicate in English in the kind of everyday situations they are likely to encounter while overseas for study or travel. Examples include
Using public transportation
Eating out
Asking for directions
Hotels and hostels
Shopping
We will be actively learning the appropriate language use in these and other situations through practical activities, and practice using it.
aims:
The aim of this course is to teach pragmatic English skills that will enable students to communicate in everyday situations they will encounter when overseas. The emphasis in this course is to learn through using the language.
このコースの目的は、海外で遭遇する日常的な状況においてコミュニケーションを図るための実用的な英語力を習得することです。このコースでは、実際に言語を使用しながら学習することに重点を置いています。
goals: Students will develop understanding of pragmatic spoken English skills needed to communicate in various contexts when overseas
Through practice students will develop ability to use the pragmatic spoken English skills needed to communicate in various contexts when overseas
Through practice students will develop confidence in using the pragmatic English skills needed to communicate in various contexts when overseas
Students will develop understanding of English as it is used as as a tool for international communication
textbooks: Materials for this course will be provided by the instructor and are also available for download from the MOODLE website
prereq:
This course is designed for students who plan to travel overseas either for study purposes or for travel. The focus is on learning actively, so is suited to students who are prepared to participate in class pair and groupwork activities. There is no minimum proficiency requirement, but the course is taught in English so students should be able to comprehend spoken English.
このコースは、留学や旅行など、海外へ行く予定のある学生を対象としています。 学習の中心は能動的な学習ですので、ペアワークやグループワークなどのクラス活動に参加する意思のある学生に適しています。 最低限の英語力は必要ありませんが、授業は英語で行われますので、英語を聞き取る能力が必要です。
prep: Participants are required to complete out-of-class assignments (approximately 1hr / week) in addition to the class activities.
